ayat.arabic_uthmani: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ لِإِيلَـٰفِ قُرَيْشٍ

ayat.english: For their taming (We cause) the caravans to set forth in winter and summer.
So let them worship the Lord of this House,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: ٱلَّذِىٓ أَطْعَمَهُم مِّن جُوعٍ وَءَامَنَهُم مِّنْ خَوْفٍۭ
ayat.english: Who hath fed them against hunger and hath made them safe from fear.
